homepage.title: HERE Technologies | The world's #1 location platform
homepage.description: HERE is a PaaS for building, deploying and scaling location solutions. Create custom maps, visualize location datasets, gather insights and buy and sell location assets.

about.text:
Location Technology | Autonomous World | About Us | HERE
About HERE Technologies
We make a unified live map designed for every moving vehicle
Play video
40+
years of experience in map-making and location technology
238m+
vehicles shipped with HERE map data and solutions on board
6400+
employees across 52 countries
Our path
Who we are
HERE is the world’s leading mapping company. Forty years ago, we started with a digital map of San Francisco. Today, we set the standard for automotive-grade maps globally and partner to define the future of the software-defined vehicle. Our customers are leading automakers, logistics firms, mobility providers and technology brands.
What we do
We deliver the world’s best unified map to our customers. A map with more precision, more flexibility and more control. A map that is powering the next generation of vehicle automation and safety, enabling innovation and efficiency, and driving sustainable growth across industries.
Why we do it
A great map doesn’t just mark a destination; it reveals the promise of a faster, safer and more efficient journey. Smarter routes unfold. Goods reach the right hands. Precious minutes are saved. Because a better map can make a better world.
Our purpose principles
Rise to the challenge
Welcoming debate, testing assumptions and exchanging ideas is how we achieve our best thinking and arrive at the brightest answers.
Channel curiosity
United by a deep desire to understand the world, we travel, seek and discover, staying open to new perspectives.
Chart new frontiers
We have the vision to see what doesn’t yet exist, the courage to do what's never been done and the grit to get there.
Advance by listening
Always learning while listening, we build close relationships and broaden our knowledge to help our people and customers go further.
Earn trust at every turn
We focus on details and protect our customers' information like our own, with a passion for precision and empathy in every action.
HERE extends lead as #1 location platform
From a detailed category overview and ranking of vendors to monetization and growth comparison. Find out why HERE ranks above its biggest competitors like Google and Mapbox.
Download the report
Learn more about HERE

products.text:
Products Overview
Products Overview
Explore our products
Start building
Browse our extensive range of location services
Maps & data
Build accurate maps and custom layers using fresh location data generated by hundreds of mapping vehicles worldwide. Elevate the comfort and safety of driving experiences with our portfolio of dynamic content services.
Map Data
Build your own world view using our map data as a canvas. Turn your map into a location-based application by layering it with data from other sources.
Dynamic Map Content
Enhance the journey experience with real-time information. Help drivers arrive safely, comfortably and on schedule, by using dynamic content APIs in your apps and services.
Maps for ADAS and HAD
Make the driving experience safer and more comfortable – with location technology, maps and data for assisted and automated driving.
Location services
Create connected journeys for fleets, passengers and businesses with advanced algorithms. Bring high-precision location awareness to your apps and devices to improve location accuracy and make journey planning easier.
HERE Routing
Plan stress-free journeys. Discover our routing portfolio designed for various modes of transport.
HERE Geocoding & Search
Enable precise conversion and discovery of geocoordinates and addresses to improve location accuracy and context.
HERE Map Rendering
Render spatial data to suit your business needs. Use data that is accurate, comprehensive and updated daily.
HERE Positioning
Bring high-precision location awareness to your apps and devices, even in challenging indoor and outdoor environments.
HERE Tour Planning
Improve how you utilize your fleet with many-to-many route planning and customizable, en route optimization.
Applications
Optimize last mile deliveries, track assets in real time and deliver the freshest SaaS automotive navigation. Find out how to minimize asset loss and reduce operating costs in your supply chain.
HERE Navigation
Deliver a complete navigation and services experience for connected vehicles – with a turnkey or customizable Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) solution.
HERE WeGo
Wherever you're going, the refreshed WeGo navigation app will help you get there. Enjoy your journey.
